reviews.review_description: It was a fun game to play for a horror night with friends. Gameplay took us about 2.5 hours, which wasn't very long, but still got it in a sale of 2 or 3 euros so totally worth it. There are a few glitches, but it is definitely playable.

Only for some glitches it could be a lot better, few jump scares, but the opening of doors is so bad, then you accidentally lock yourself in a room and have to restart it again because the door just won’t open , it needs an update..

reviews.review_title: I liked it, worth the purchase
reviews.review_description:
I got it on sale for like 3-4 bucks, based off other reviews it sounded like a broken mess that won’t even open you know, it works perfectly though. Only problems I had was gameplay and it’s small things, like no left or right movement, literally just forward and backwards

There was another problem I had but I literally forgot it, not that huge if I managed to forget after like what an hour break after playing it?

I’d say worth it though yea, scares are mostly good, haven’t finished it but the crazy stuff I’ve seen so far man just has me wondering how this got forgotten and buried so bad

This game definitely isn't worth buying..I bought it last year and it was bad glitched and everything couldn't even play the game..well fast forward to now and it's still the same.!! They haven't even fixed it yet..so you can't even play it..Don't waste your money on this game.!!!

developer_response.body: Hello, would you mind being very specific as to the issues you are having? which headset are you usingQuest 1,2 or 3? Not sure how to apporach it if we're not sure what bugs you are describing. Thank you and thank you for supporting our game.

reviews.review_description: I bought this when it was on sale for £1 (thank god) i played it in about 20 minutes was hardly scared and had to restart the game twice due to glitches, definitely not worth £14 but di have a good story
I wanted to like this game but the movement and controls are horrible for a game based off a movie that did so well i'd expect a much better game it seems like the dev team didn't care at all

I was really enjoying this game......until.....the basement. I could not pick up the flashlight. I have tried to reboot and try again,  numerous times. Nothing....can't really play it now. I'm very disappointed.

Escape room vibes for sure, the game was a fun addition to game night, we took turns playing while casting the game and it was long enough to keep us entertained but beatable in one play session between the 3 of us. It does require some attention to the small details at parts which I enjoyed as well. Overall a fun game even if there were a few glitches with the dang doors but we laughed it off 😅

As others have stated, the game is just way too buggy to be enjoyed.
Door handles are a mess, making opening doors pure luck. And this game has some serious issues with boundaries. More than once I have been pushed to a different room, or flew between floors.
Barely playable, also boring. You wander around aimlessly, finding a key somewhere, waiting for some random door to open, get a cheap jumpscare - and repeat the process.

The game worked for awhile when I first got it then I got off for an update and when I got back on and loaded into the game I was super high up like touching the ceiling and everytime I moved I was pushed into the wall and couldn’t see or move. I uninstalled the game and redownloaded it twice and it still kept doing the same thing I even started up a new game to see if my old one was just the problem nope did the exact same thing. Pretty upset it was really fun till it broke.

Loved the sounds and look. Using doors was tricky to get used to. When the first intense moment of the game made you run into a door that opened for you the game took me out of the boundary with no way back in. 

I plan on finishing this game, but I hope the next time I have to run to safety I don’t have to worry how I go through a doorway.
Downloaded, would not play. Un Downloaded and reinstalled, still wouldn't play. I was very excited for this one.
Why lie soon I got the key I stop playing I feel that something was gone happen lol 😂 great 👍 game love it ⚡️😈
It was an ok game it glitched a lot but other than that it was ok I had fun and that is the point of games so it's just a mid game that has glitches that need to be fixed

I read the many other reviews warning about the playability of this game (I’m on Quest 3) and I foolishly chose to get it anyway because it was on sale.  It is the buggiest game I’ve ever seen.  Doors are a major headache to open, and there are tons of them and they have a tendency to close automatically forcing you to try several more times to reopen them.  The main reason for the one star review is that I was unable to complete the game because halfway through it my flashlight got stuck in the floor with no way to grab it again, forcing me to end the game as this is a necessary item.  I would avoid this one even if it was free. Graphically and atmosphere-wise it is nice, but it really doesn’t have many scary moments.  Meta declined my refund request, so be aware.

reviews.review_title: The Game is Scary but Incomplete
reviews.review_description: The game has claimed to have side objectives, but it's not in the game to allow you. The ending is terrible, but it's like a simulator.

It's uncomfortable to play. Things sometimes are out of reach and instead of being scary is ANNOYING. I can't get my money back because unfortunately I've played more than 2 hours looking for stuff in this totally unintuitive game.

The game delivers a few jumpscares, but the overall experience feels repetitive and sluggish. A significant portion of the gameplay involves walking at an excruciatingly slow pace through the house, searching for accessible doors. This often results in going in circles, which can be more frustrating than immersive. Unfortunately, the pacing and design choices hinder the ability to fully engage with the horror elements. Sadly disappointed...
I’m trying to go through a hallway but I can’t. And you have to try all different things JUST to open a door!

I usually don’t play horror games, but I decided to give one a try. I kept the volume very low and had a YouTube video playing alongside to ease the tension. However, after playing for about half the game, I became accustomed to the environment, and it didn’t feel so daunting anymore. I played through the game twice, experiencing both endings. I didn't encounter a single glitch, so it seems that any issues others had reported have been resolved. While the game is short, I got it on sale for a great price, and I don’t mind short scary games; there’s only so much fear one can take at once. Overall, I really enjoyed the experience.

I loved the exploration aspect of this game. The surreal and paranormal elements were done really well, creating an effective atmosphere. It was refreshing to play a game that wasn't based on combat! The story unfolds well as you progress. Sure, it was a bit glitchy in places but it didn't detract from the overall enjoyment for me. I finished it in one sitting, so not the longest game but one of the most enjoyable and memorable ones I've played. If you're looking for a slow burn paranormal adventure based on story and exploration then I'd definitely give it a try

Glitching  at every corner. Walkdown stairs impossible avitar floats through roof. Open doors glitches you into the room. Walls disapair  become see through. Sometimes for no reason you teleport to another room only to be stuck inside cannot open door. 
When refund requested due to bugs it was  declined.
Do  not recomend
Wish I could get my money back… played 10min nothing scary about it… refund please

I’m a horror fanatic and this is an amazing game. That says a lot coming from someone who loves anything horror. Not much issues to this game! Want a great horror experience, try this game. 👍🏻 thumbs up on this game. Also gotta try the exorcist if you like horror.
I agree the game is difficult to operate hands get left on drawers hands getting left on door knobs it's ridiculous I want my money back

Well I never got past the basement. Infact I got stuck in there the door wouldn't open and there was nothing left for me to do. I even looked at a game play to figure out what to do next and I was just stuck so I restarted as one would. When I got to the part where the lady was hammering I had to hide in the closet well every time I hid I would glitch and go through a wall and get stuck. My only option is to restart and try again... several times. This happened every time I tried but I got sick of having to play the same part over and over. It would help if the game had an option to save when we want so I didn't have to go back very far each time
I purchased the game and downloaded it.  Cannot even play it keeps freezing up harroble and I have good wifi.  How can I get my money back?
Totally glitches. No advancing during play.

developer_response.body: thanks for the support of our game.  Not sure why you're having an issue, but as a small indie studio, giving 1-star actual hurts our business. if you do not like the game, than we respect that. But giving a single star without understanding the issues you are having and without giving us the chance to see how we can resolve it truly hurts us and our hard working team.  Please give us a bit more details so we may be able to see what was wrong.  Are you using Quest 1 or 2? tethered or untethered? you bought the game from the oculus/Meta quest store?  thanks again.

reviews.review_description: How do you open the red door
Cool

It's like your actually in the house when things happen.. I love anything to do with horror and don't get scared easy but playing this game I screamed a few times lol.. awesome game .. I hope they add more to the collection
I love it. I’m totally addicted.

reviews.review_title: It keeps freezing when it get to clickin
reviews.review_description: it keeps freezing when it get to the part where it ask to click the screen during the tutorial.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you are having issues. which Quest are you using 1 or 2?  tethered or untethered? thought the oculus store or Steam? thank you.

reviews.review_description: Cannot  get passed the tutorial. Cannot click the in game screen button. Able to do it with other games and apps. Read threads that say this is a problem they haven't fixed. Pissed that I payed for this and can't get passed the tutorial

developer_response.body: first off thank you for your support of our game. what is the bug you are having? what do you mean you cant get past the tutorial? where are you getting stuck during the tutorial? please provide further details for us. thank you.

reviews.review_description: Love the game, although the mechanics of it is a little wonky but other then that! Great game!
This game is wild and scary

I have played the game now for roughly 3 days after work and I launched it today and have had nothing but issues! 😔 it glitches out really bad, the floor level isn’t synced with the meta menus level. I’m either in the rafters of the ceiling or it looks like I’m crawling on the floor. Current level I just found the room behind the fireplace and any time I go in the room it will glitch me back on the other side of the door, coins will disappear OR it will glitch me into the corner where the old stair case is and I can’t move at all to where I’ll have to restart. it will load to where I’m standing outside the house and ironically hitch me back to standing in front of the fireplace. If I knew this game would cause this much issue I never would have payed for it 😔

developer_response.body: Hello, first off thank you for supporting our game. We have forwarded this to our QA team to see if there is an issue in the game. we're sorry for the issues you are having. We continue to work on updates and hopefully our next update will resolve any of the issues you're having if it is an in-game bug. Please try resetting the grid before trying the game again. thank you.

reviews.review_description:
On my first play through I did experience a glitch. I ended up in the fireplace room on accident. My guess is, I was too close to the door when it slams shut. I was stuck in the room not knowing what to do. I also didn't realize it was a glitch until I started a new game.
Once I started the new game, I did not encounter any glitches. The game has nice puzzle aspects and is really fun and scary. I really enjoyed it!

Controls are a literal nightmare, gives me motion sickness and no other game does this to me. Opening doors and drawers are a nightmare. Take notes from Job Simulator on how to open and close doors without me wanting to give up on playing. Could be such a better experience without these issues.
When you walk up to a door and try to look thru it you get glitched back into another room. Sometimes it will put you in a room thats locked and you have no choice but to start the whole thing over.
